title: Mace but 3D
description: Adds a clean 3D model that appears while holding the mace
body:
### **This mod will not be updated past 1.21.3 since this can now be implemented with resource packs.**
For versions above 1.21.3 check [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mace-but-3d-resourcepack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mace-but-3d-resourcepack)
# Mace but 3D
Many players including myself were disappointed when they found out the mace wasn't going to have a 3D model in 1.21. Well this mod fixes that.
Mace but 3D is a fabric mod that adds a clean 3D model to the mace. Unlike in resource-packs, the custom model appears only while holding it, giving it a more vanilla feel.

![First Person view while holding the mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4066ba684fa433c18ac13220d272bbf1c620637.png)

For example, while in an item frame, the mace retains its normal model like the trident and the spyglass.

![Mace in an item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf0438550290a2b653d6e201cfbff805c7f61eb4.png)

The mod is client-side and should work perfectly in any server. 
You are free to put it inside your modpack.
